headline: Can Lam Research's Systems Business Sustain Growth Amid AI Capex Boom?
summary: LRCX rides on AI-driven chip demand as Systems revenues rise 28% and new tech gains traction, but can the company sustain momentum through 2026 growth targets?

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Global Oil Prices Jump; Micron Falls Despite Blowout Earnings
summary: Futures wavered with global oil prices above $115. Micron slid despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows Wednesday.

headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
summary: Supply allocations are being set by who needs the gas the most. Semiconductors are at the "top of the pecking order," said helium consultant Phil Kornbluth.

summary: Futures wavered with global oil prices above $115. Micron slid despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows on cautious Powell comments.

headline: This Is How You Track Risk Of Your Micron Stock Investment
summary: Micron Technology (MU) reported its Q2 FY26 earnings yesterday, March 18, and the data was staggering. Non-GAAP EPS hit $12.20, a huge jump vs last quarter that crushed consensus estimates. How did this happen? The revenue skyrocketed 196% year-over-year while gross margins expanded massively to nearly 75%. And despite a very strong guidance, the stock dropped roughly 4.4% in after-hours trading. Why.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Oil Backs Off $100; Micron Skids Despite Blowout Earnings
summary: Futures dipped as U.S. oil prices hit $100 while Micron fell despite blowout earnings. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 undercut recent lows on cautious Powell comments.
